records.ety: [L. parens, -entis; akin to parere to bring forth; cf. Gr. porei^n to give, beget: cf. F. parent. Cf. Part.]

defs: One who begets, or brings forth, offspring; a father or a mother.
quotes: Children, obey your parents in the Lord.

defs: That which produces; cause; source; author; begetter; as, idleness is the parent of vice.
quotes: Regular industry is the parent of sobriety.
